---
title: "Vignette - Snippets"
id: vignette_snippets
author: brad_cannell
date: 2026-01-31
date-modified: 2026-01-31
audience: developers
category: vignette
tags:
  - vs_code
  - positron
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Overview

- This vignette is about creating snippets in VS Code (Positron)
- This could be helpful for many things, including adding resuable chunks to AI conversations.
